name: The World of Femboys
description:
[M4A]
You died.

Well, not really.

After tragically falling onto the train tracks, you find yourself not ACTUALLY dead. Just a bit confused. And concussed.

Then all of a sudden there's two moons in the sky, no sight of civilisation anywhere, and you're naked and afraid in the middle of a cold hilltop.

Well, then. Maybe you should panic.

.

PSA: Mpreg is possible 🫢; obviously not for you unless you have a functioning womb or magical powers lol

...

Idk honestly. I just wanted to interact with femboys and big butts, so I made a (complicated) bot just for that. Butts over breasts I am loyal 🫡 (I recommend having unlimited response generation if you want an immersive narrative 🦄)

Technically you can do NSFW or not - it's a free range medieval fantasy RPG. I tried to make it act like one, so if it keeps repeating stuff or guiding the narrative into being entirely sexual when you don't want it to be then idk mate. (And the picture was mainly cuz I scoured r34 for hours and gave myself the risk of having "pawrn" in my gallery so you bet I'm gonna use everything I found.)

Test notes: There's definitely a possibility for a horror scenario lmao.

...

Some things the author (me) wants to say:

  • ALL CHARACTERS ARE OF AGE OR OLDER; there should be no minors but if the bot adds one, then welp, woop-dee-do.

  • This is fiction, and based as a fantastical, non-realistic scenario. If the topics that come through your chat are uncomfortable, you need not engage with that plotline nor condone it

  • If you want to make your chats public, please do. It's great help for seeing the bot in action and tweaking issues with the settings

  • Tip: If the bot repeats what you say, then just regenerate a response. If you keep at it and still nothing, then sucks to suck idk I'm not a techie lol pepesadge

...

*I finally decided to release this one for the world to see (oh god) - and technically this is my first scenario bot. So if there's problems with it, welp. I tried. And this desc is really long holy crap mb

Update 13/2: img change for (sort of) sfw
creator: Nue_Fu
